global_description: A small songbird with a slender body and pointed wings. It features a striking combination of gray, black, and yellow plumage. The bird has a distinctive black mask across its eyes and a bright yellow crown on its head. Its underparts are pale gray, and it has a thin, pointed bill.

part_details.head: Bright yellow crown with a black mask across the eyes, small and rounded.
part_details.wings: Pointed, with a mix of gray and black feathers.
part_details.body: Slender, covered in gray plumage with pale gray underparts.
part_details.bill: Thin, pointed, suitable for insectivorous feeding.

spatial_relations: The yellow crown is positioned on top of the head.
The black mask extends across the eyes.
The pointed wings are attached to the sides of the slender body.
